episodes.body: John started working at TechCorp as a Junior Developer.
John was promoted to Senior Developer at TechCorp.
John transitioned to a Project Manager role at TechCorp.
John became the Head of Development at TechCorp.

queries.query: What is John's role at TechCorp as of December 2023?
queries.expected_reason: The Project Manager role was valid in December 2023.

queries.query: What is John's current position at TechCorp?
queries.expected_reason: The Head of Development role is the most recent as of the query time.

episodes.body: Emma joined InnovateX as a Marketing Specialist.
Emma was promoted to Marketing Manager at InnovateX.
Emma took on the role of Director of Marketing at InnovateX.
Emma became the Chief Marketing Officer at InnovateX.

queries.query: What was Emma's role at InnovateX in July 2023?
queries.expected_reason: The Director of Marketing role was valid in July 2023.

queries.query: What is Emma's latest position at InnovateX?
queries.expected_reason: The Chief Marketing Officer role is the most recent update.

episodes.body: On January 1, 2023, TechStream introduced a new Basic Plan with limited features.
TechStream upgraded the Basic Plan to include additional streaming quality options.
TechStream discontinued the Basic Plan and replaced it with the Starter Plan, offering more features at a similar price.

queries.query: What plan replaced the Basic Plan at TechStream?
queries.expected_reason: The Starter Plan is the latest update replacing the Basic Plan.

queries.query: What was included in the Basic Plan as of June 2023?
queries.expected_reason: The Basic Plan was upgraded in June 2023 to include more options.

episodes.body: StreamFlix launched a Premium Plan with exclusive content access.
StreamFlix added offline download capabilities to the Premium Plan.
StreamFlix rebranded the Premium Plan to the Elite Plan, maintaining all previous features.

queries.query: What is the current name of the Premium Plan at StreamFlix?
queries.expected_reason: The Elite Plan is the current name after rebranding.

queries.query: What feature was added to the Premium Plan in March 2023?
queries.expected_reason: Offline download was the specific feature added in March 2023.

episodes.body: The price of the PhotonX smartphone was set at $699.
Due to increased demand, the price of the PhotonX smartphone was raised to $749.
A holiday discount reduced the price of the PhotonX smartphone to $699.

queries.query: What was the price of the PhotonX smartphone on July 1, 2023?
queries.expected_reason: The price was $749 due to the increase in June 2023.

queries.query: What is the current price of the PhotonX smartphone?
queries.expected_reason: The holiday discount reduced the price to $699.

episodes.body: The initial price of the EcoClean vacuum was set at $199.
A supply chain issue caused the price of the EcoClean vacuum to rise to $229.
The price of the EcoClean vacuum was adjusted to $219 following a market analysis.
A promotional offer temporarily reduced the price of the EcoClean vacuum to $199.

queries.query: What was the price of the EcoClean vacuum in December 2022?
queries.expected_reason: The price was $229 due to the supply chain issue in November 2022.

queries.query: What is the latest price update for the EcoClean vacuum?
queries.expected_reason: The promotional offer reduced the price to $199.

episodes.body: TechCorp released version 1.0 of their software, introducing basic features and functionalities.
TechCorp updated their software to version 1.1, adding new security patches and minor improvements.
Version 2.0 was launched by TechCorp, featuring a complete redesign and enhanced performance.

queries.query: What is the latest version of TechCorp's software?
queries.expected_reason: Version 2.0 is the most recent release.

queries.query: What version was released by TechCorp in January 2023?
queries.expected_reason: Version 1.0 was released in January 2023.

episodes.body: InnovateSoft launched version A of their application, focusing on user-friendly design.
Version B was released by InnovateSoft, introducing advanced analytics features.
InnovateSoft's version C came out, offering cloud integration and enhanced security.

queries.query: What features were introduced in InnovateSoft's latest version?
queries.expected_reason: Version C is the latest, with cloud integration and enhanced security.

queries.query: What was the focus of InnovateSoft's version A?
queries.expected_reason: Version A focused on user-friendly design.

episodes.body: A minor fire broke out in the server room of TechCorp, causing temporary shutdown of services.
TechCorp announced that the fire was contained and services were partially restored.
Full services were restored at TechCorp after the server room was repaired.
TechCorp implemented new fire safety protocols to prevent future incidents.

queries.query: What was the status of TechCorp's services on January 2, 2023?
queries.expected_reason: The query specifies a date, requiring the status valid on January 2, 2023.

queries.query: What is the current status of TechCorp's services?
queries.expected_reason: The query asks for the current status at the query time.

queries.query: What changes did TechCorp make after the fire incident?
queries.expected_reason: The query seeks a sequence of events following the incident.

episodes.body: A data breach was detected at SecureData, compromising user information.
SecureData confirmed the breach and began notifying affected users.
SecureData completed a security audit and implemented additional safeguards.
SecureData announced that all systems were secure and fully operational.

queries.query: What was SecureData's system status on May 3, 2023?
queries.expected_reason: The query specifies a date, requiring the status valid on May 3, 2023.

queries.query: What is the latest update on SecureData's system security?
queries.gold_answer: All systems secure and fully operational.
queries.expected_reason: The query asks for the most recent update.

queries.query: What actions did SecureData take after the breach?
queries.gold_answer: Completed a security audit and implemented safeguards.
queries.expected_reason: The query seeks a sequence of actions following the breach.

episodes.body: The government introduced a new tax policy reducing corporate tax rates by 5%.
An amendment was made to the tax policy, increasing corporate tax rates by 2%.
The tax policy was revised again, this time reducing the rates by 3%.

queries.query: What is the current corporate tax rate policy?
queries.gold_answer: The tax policy reduces corporate tax rates by 3%.
queries.expected_reason: The latest revision reduces the rates by 3%, which is the current policy.

queries.query: What was the corporate tax policy on July 1, 2023?
queries.gold_answer: The policy increased corporate tax rates by 2%.
queries.expected_reason: The policy on July 1, 2023, was the amendment increasing rates by 2%.

episodes.body: The city council implemented a new parking regulation, allowing free parking on weekends.
The parking regulation was updated to include a fee for weekend parking.
The regulation was revised again, reinstating free weekend parking.

queries.query: What is the current weekend parking regulation?
queries.expected_reason: The latest revision reinstated free weekend parking.

queries.query: What was the parking regulation on April 1, 2023?
queries.gold_answer: A fee was required for weekend parking.
queries.expected_reason: The regulation at that time required a fee for weekend parking.

episodes.body: The GreenTech Initiative was launched by InnovateCorp with Sarah as the project owner.
Sarah handed over the project ownership of the GreenTech Initiative to Michael.
Michael transitioned the project ownership of the GreenTech Initiative to Emma.

queries.query: Who is the current project owner of the GreenTech Initiative?
queries.expected_reason: Emma is the latest project owner as of the query time.

queries.query: Who was the project owner of the GreenTech Initiative in June 2023?
queries.expected_reason: Michael was the project owner during June 2023.

queries.query: What is the latest update on the project ownership of the GreenTech Initiative?
queries.expected_reason: Emma is the most recent project owner according to the latest update.

episodes.body: The BlueSky Project was initiated by TechSolutions with David as the project owner.
David transferred the project ownership of the BlueSky Project to Lisa.
Lisa passed the project ownership of the BlueSky Project to John.
John delegated the project ownership of the BlueSky Project to Karen.

queries.query: Who is the current project owner of the BlueSky Project?
queries.expected_reason: Karen is the current project owner as of the query time.

queries.query: Who was the project owner of the BlueSky Project in April 2023?
queries.expected_reason: Lisa was the project owner in April 2023.

queries.query: What is the latest update on the project ownership of the BlueSky Project?
queries.expected_reason: Karen is the most recent project owner according to the latest update.

episodes.body: John enrolled in the 'Introduction to Quantum Mechanics' course at FutureLearn University.
John switched from 'Introduction to Quantum Mechanics' to 'Advanced Quantum Mechanics' at FutureLearn University.
John dropped 'Advanced Quantum Mechanics' and enrolled in 'Quantum Computing Basics' at FutureLearn University.

queries.query: What course is John currently enrolled in at FutureLearn University?
queries.expected_reason: The 'Quantum Computing Basics' enrollment is the most recent and valid at query time.

queries.query: What course did John switch to in March 2023?
queries.expected_reason: The switch to 'Advanced Quantum Mechanics' occurred in March 2023.

episodes.body: Emily enrolled in 'Data Science 101' at TechEd Academy.
Emily transferred from 'Data Science 101' to 'Machine Learning Basics' at TechEd Academy.
Emily completed 'Machine Learning Basics' and started 'Deep Learning Advanced' at TechEd Academy.

queries.query: What course did Emily complete before starting 'Deep Learning Advanced'?
queries.expected_reason: Emily completed 'Machine Learning Basics' before starting 'Deep Learning Advanced'.

queries.query: What course is Emily currently taking at TechEd Academy?
queries.expected_reason: 'Deep Learning Advanced' is the course Emily is currently enrolled in.

episodes.body: The device was initially located in the New York office.
The device was moved to the San Francisco office for testing purposes.
After testing, the device was relocated to the Chicago office for deployment.

queries.query: Where is the device currently located?
queries.expected_reason: The Chicago office location is the most recent and valid as of the query time.

queries.query: Where was the device located on August 1, 2023?
queries.expected_reason: The San Francisco office was the correct location on the specified date.

episodes.body: The device was stationed at the Berlin headquarters for initial setup.
The device was transferred to the Paris branch for a special project.
Following the project, the device was sent to the London office for further analysis.
The device was finally moved to the Madrid office for permanent installation.

queries.query: What is the latest known location of the device?
queries.expected_reason: The Madrid office is the latest known location as of the query time.

queries.query: Where was the device before it was moved to Madrid?
queries.expected_reason: The London office was the location immediately before the move to Madrid.

episodes.body: On November 1, 2023, a support ticket was opened by John Doe regarding a login issue with the new app version.
The support team acknowledged John's ticket and escalated it to the technical department for further investigation.
The technical team resolved the login issue and marked the ticket as 'Resolved'.
John reported a new issue related to app performance, and the ticket status was updated to 'In Progress'.

queries.query: What is the current status of John's support ticket?
queries.expected_reason: The ticket was updated to 'In Progress' after a new issue was reported.

queries.query: What was the status of John's ticket on November 3, 2023?
queries.expected_reason: The ticket was marked 'Resolved' on November 3, 2023.

queries.query: How did the status of John's ticket change over time?
queries.expected_reason: The query requires the sequence of status changes.

episodes.body: A support ticket was created by Jane Smith for a billing error on October 20, 2023.
The billing department reviewed Jane's ticket and requested additional information.
Jane provided the requested information, and the ticket status was updated to 'Under Review'.
The billing error was corrected, and the ticket was closed.

queries.query: What is the latest status of Jane's support ticket?
queries.expected_reason: The ticket was closed after the billing error was corrected.

queries.query: What was the status of Jane's ticket on October 22, 2023?
queries.expected_reason: The ticket was 'Under Review' after Jane provided additional information.

queries.query: Describe the progression of Jane's ticket status.
queries.expected_reason: The query requires the chronological order of status updates.
